initial_candidates.sql:
WITH top_skills AS (
    SELECT 
        sd.skills,
        COUNT(*) AS skill_count
    FROM job_postings_fact jpf
    JOIN skills_job_dim sjd ON jpf.job_id = sjd.job_id
    JOIN skills_dim sd ON sjd.skill_id = sd.skill_id
    WHERE 
        jpf.job_title_short = 'Data Analyst'
        AND jpf.salary_year_avg IS NOT NULL
        AND jpf.job_work_from_home = 1
    GROUP BY sd.skills
    ORDER BY skill_count DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 
    AVG(jpf.salary_year_avg) AS overall_avg_salary
FROM job_postings_fact jpf
JOIN skills_job_dim sjd ON jpf.job_id = sjd.job_id
JOIN top_skills ts ON sjd.skill_id = (
    SELECT skill_id FROM skills_dim WHERE skills = ts.skills
)
WHERE 
    jpf.job_title_short = 'Data Analyst'
    AND jpf.salary_year_avg IS NOT NULL
    AND jpf.job_work_from_home = 1;

WITH top_skills AS (
    SELECT 
        sd.skills,
        COUNT(*) AS skill_count
    FROM job_postings_fact jpf
    JOIN skills_job_dim sjd ON jpf.job_id = sjd.job_id
    JOIN skills_dim sd ON sjd.skill_id = sd.skill_id
    WHERE 
        jpf.job_title_short = 'Data Analyst'
        AND jpf.salary_year_avg IS NOT NULL
        AND jpf.job_work_from_home = 1
    GROUP BY sd.skills
    ORDER BY skill_count DESC
    LIMIT 3
),
filtered_jobs AS (
    SELECT 
        jpf.job_id,
        jpf.salary_year_avg
    FROM job_postings_fact jpf
    JOIN skills_job_dim sjd ON jpf.job_id = sjd.job_id
    JOIN skills_dim sd ON sjd.skill_id = sd.skill_id
    WHERE 
        jpf.job_title_short = 'Data Analyst'
        AND jpf.salary_year_avg IS NOT NULL
        AND jpf.job_work_from_home = 1
        AND sd.skills IN (SELECT skills FROM top_skills)
)
SELECT 
    AVG(salary_year_avg) AS overall_avg_salary
FROM filtered_jobs;

WITH top_skills AS (
    SELECT 
        sd.skills,
        COUNT(*) AS skill_count
    FROM job_postings_fact jpf
    JOIN skills_job_dim sjd ON jpf.job_id = sjd.job_id
    JOIN skills_dim sd ON sjd.skill_id = sd.skill_id
    WHERE 
        jpf.job_title_short = 'Data Analyst'
        AND jpf.salary_year_avg IS NOT NULL
        AND jpf.job_work_from_home = 1
    GROUP BY sd.skills
    ORDER BY skill_count DESC
    LIMIT 3
),
filtered_jobs AS (
    SELECT 
        jpf.job_id,
        jpf.salary_year_avg
    FROM job_postings_fact jpf
    JOIN skills_job_dim sjd ON jpf.job_id = sjd.job_id
    JOIN top_skills ts ON sjd.skill_id = (
        SELECT skill_id FROM skills_dim WHERE skills = ts.skills
    )
    WHERE 
        jpf.job_title_short = 'Data Analyst'
        AND jpf.salary_year_avg IS NOT NULL
        AND jpf.job_work_from_home = 1
)
SELECT 
    AVG(salary_year_avg) AS overall_avg_salary
FROM filtered_jobs;

WITH top_skills AS (
    SELECT 
        skills_dim.skills,
        COUNT(*) AS skill_count
    FROM 
        job_postings_fact
    JOIN 
        skills_job_dim ON job_postings_fact.job_id = skills_job_dim.job_id
    JOIN 
        skills_dim ON skills_job_dim.skill_id = skills_dim.skill_id
    WHERE 
        job_postings_fact.job_title_short = 'Data Analyst'
        AND job_postings_fact.salary_year_avg IS NOT NULL
        AND job_postings_fact.job_work_from_home = 1
    GROUP BY 
        skills_dim.skills
    ORDER BY 
        skill_count DESC
    LIMIT 3
),
filtered_jobs AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        job_postings_fact.job_id,
        job_postings_fact.salary_year_avg
    FROM 
        job_postings_fact
    JOIN 
        skills_job_dim ON job_postings_fact.job_id = skills_job_dim.job_id
    JOIN 
        skills_dim ON skills_job_dim.skill_id = skills_dim.skill_id
    WHERE 
        job_postings_fact.job_title_short = 'Data Analyst'
        AND job_postings_fact.salary_year_avg IS NOT NULL
        AND job_postings_fact.job_work_from_home = 1
        AND skills_dim.skills IN (SELECT skills FROM top_skills)
)
SELECT 
    AVG(salary_year_avg) AS overall_avg_salary
FROM 
    filtered_jobs;

WITH top_skills AS (
    SELECT 
        sd.skills,
        COUNT(*) AS skill_count
    FROM 
        job_postings_fact jpf
    JOIN 
        skills_job_dim sjd ON jpf.job_id = sjd.job_id
    JOIN 
        skills_dim sd ON sjd.skill_id = sd.skill_id
    WHERE 
        jpf.job_title_short = 'Data Analyst'
        AND jpf.salary_year_avg IS NOT NULL
        AND jpf.job_work_from_home = 1
    GROUP BY 
        sd.skills
    ORDER BY 
        skill_count DESC
    LIMIT 3
),
filtered_jobs AS (
    SELECT 
        jpf.job_id,
        jpf.salary_year_avg
    FROM 
        job_postings_fact jpf
    JOIN 
        skills_job_dim sjd ON jpf.job_id = sjd.job_id
    JOIN 
        skills_dim sd ON sjd.skill_id = sd.skill_id
    WHERE 
        jpf.job_title_short = 'Data Analyst'
        AND jpf.salary_year_avg IS NOT NULL
        AND jpf.job_work_from_home = 1
        AND sd.skills IN (SELECT skills FROM top_skills)
)
SELECT 
    AVG(salary_year_avg) AS overall_avg_salary
FROM 
    filtered_jobs;
